criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
candidate reaches minimum accuracy on repaired tasks
candidate improves over v1.4 raw CRA
internal candidate approaches external scaffold
criteria.note: Internal memory can trail the 5.10c scaffold slightly but cannot collapse relative to it.

criteria.name: memory ablations are worse than candidate
candidate is competitive with best standard baseline
criteria.note: Strong baselines may still win some tasks, but candidate cannot be far behind before promotion.

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Software diagnostic only: internal host-side context binding, not native on-chip memory, sleep/replay, or hardware evidence.

summary.claim_boundary: Software diagnostic only: internal host-side context binding, not native on-chip memory, sleep/replay, or hardware evidence.

tier: Tier 5.10d - Internal Context Memory Implementation Diagnostic
